description: CompositionGrey knit jacket made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed mock neck, zipper placket on the front, two insert pockets on the sides of the zipper with ribbed trims, ribbed side seams, ribbed hemline and green tipping along all the ribbingFittingComfortWash careWash in cold water using mild detergentDo not bleach, tumble dry or wringDry flat in shadeIron on lowDry cleanableThe ribbed mock neck and green tipping adds smooth styling to this grey knit jacket from turtle. The cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day, while the fashionable cuts offer a flattering Fit. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa, making it an environment friendly choice. Team this with shirts or t-shirts and jeans.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 39"
